title: Brasilidium crispum
taxonomy: Brasilidium crispum is a genus of flowering plants in the family Brassicaceae. Brasilidium crispum is native to South America and belongs to the Brassicaceae family which includes cabbages, mustard, and other related species. The plant is further classified into the order Brassicales, which comprises flowering plants with similar characteristics. Brasilidium crispum's classification is based on its morphology and genetic relationships with other species within the Brassicaceae family. Further research is needed to determine the exact classification and relationships of this plant.
